Package microui.core

Class LinearRangeControl

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.core.base.SpatialView
microui.core.base.ContentView
microui.core.base.Component
microui.core.RangeControl
microui.core.LinearRangeControl
All Implemented Interfaces:
Scrollable, ValuePreviewSource, Visible
Direct Known Subclasses:
Scroll, Slider
public abstract class LinearRangeControl extends RangeControl
Abstract base class for linear range control components (sliders, scroll-bars). Provides common functionality for components that allow selecting a value along a linear axis, with support for orientation, mouse wheel scrolling, and value change events.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • LinearRangeControl

      public LinearRangeControl(float x, float y, float width, float height)
      Constructs a LinearRangeControl with specified position and dimensions. Initializes with horizontal orientation and default size constraints.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the control's top-left corner
      y - the y-coordinate of the control's top-left corner
      width - the width of the control
      height - the height of the control

  • Method Details

    • mouseWheel

      public void mouseWheel(processing.event.MouseEvent event)
      Handles mouse wheel events for value adjustment. When the control is hovered, mouse wheel scrolling adjusts the value.
      Parameters:
      event - the mouse wheel event

    • isContentPrepared

      public boolean isContentPrepared()
      Description copied from interface: ValuePreviewSource
      Checks if the content is ready for display.
      Returns:
      true if the content is ready, false otherwise

    • mouseWheel

      public void mouseWheel(processing.event.MouseEvent event, boolean additionalCondition)
      Handles mouse wheel events with an additional condition for value adjustment. Useful for nested controls or special interaction cases.
      Parameters:
      event - the mouse wheel event
      additionalCondition - additional condition that must be true for wheel to affect value

    • getOrientation

      public final Orientation getOrientation()
      Gets the current orientation of the control.
      Returns:
      the current orientation (HORIZONTAL or VERTICAL)

    • setOrientation

      public final void setOrientation(Orientation orientation)
      Sets the orientation of the control and swaps dimensions accordingly. When changing from horizontal to vertical, width and height are swapped.
      Parameters:
      orientation - the new orientation to set

    • swapOrientation

      public void swapOrientation()
      Swaps the current orientation (horizontal в†” vertical). Automatically swaps width and height dimensions.
